focus: Consistency is what transforms average into excellence.
Hey {user_name}, stay in the zone! Focus determines your reality.
One step at a time, {user_name}. You have been focusing for {elapsed_minutes} minutes!
Only {remaining_minutes} minutes remaining in this session. Finish strong!
Excellence is not a skill. It is an attitude.
Do not stop when you are tired. Stop when you are done.
Excellence takes time, but every second counts.
Keep going, you've completed {tasks_completed} tasks so far!
Your future self will thank you for the focus you put in today.
Energy and persistence conquer all things.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
break: Take a deep breath and relax. You've earned this break!
Step away from the screen, stretch, and grab some water.
Great session, {user_name}! Enjoy your well-deserved break.
Rest is part of the work. Recharge and get ready for the next round.
So far you accomplished {tasks_completed} tasks this session. Excellent work!
Disconnect for a moment. Breathe in, breathe out.
